name: Case Details - View - Small Updates - Mobile

children.name: Sarah Johnson is a single mother of two children seeking housing assistance after losing her apartment due to job loss. She currently has temporary housing but needs permanent housing within 60 days. Her income is below the threshold for the Housing First program.
